summary: The diff modifies BrideGroomEntrySection.tsx and DecorSection.tsx. REQ-1 asked to remove an img element from the third card of BrideGroomEntrySection — the new BrideGroomEntrySection.tsx uses a data-driven map and contains no img elements, so REQ-1 appears satisfied. REQ-2 and REQ-3 require removal of the 4th and 5th card/div elements from section[8] (the section immediately following BrideGroomEntrySection). DecorSection.tsx only shows 3 cards in its grid, but the project_state.json still marks all three AR items as 'pending', and there is no diff evidence showing items were deleted from a previously larger list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the fourth card/div element from section[8]'s content grid.
missing_requirements.reason: DecorSection.tsx has only 3 items in its decorThemes array. There is no diff evidence showing a 4th card was deleted from a previously larger list. project_state.json marks AR-2 as pending.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the fifth card/div element from section[8]'s content grid.
missing_requirements.reason: DecorSection.tsx has only 3 items in its decorThemes array. There is no diff evidence showing a 5th card was deleted from a previously larger list. project_state.json marks AR-3 as pending.
